title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Tapping the left circle button on the earbuds visualization screen toggles zoom in/out unexpectedly in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the connected earbuds device name or visualization to enter the Device Settings screen.
4. On the Device Settings screen, locate the left circle button (likely associated with earbud visualization or device management).
5. Tap the left circle button once.
6. Observe the screen behavior after tapping.
7. Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: Tapping the left circle button should toggle between zoomed-in and zoomed-out views of the earbud visualization/device management screen. The first tap zooms in and displays new text; the second tap zooms out to the original screen.
